fallback.title: Qualcosa è andato storto
fallback.message: Si è verificato un errore imprevisto

codes.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Qualcosa è andato storto. Please try again shortly.
codes.NETWORK_ERROR: We could not connect a server. Please check your internet connection e try again.
codes.REQUEST_TIMEOUT: server took too long a respond. Please try again.
codes.BACKEND_HOST_UNREACHABLE: We could not reach server. Please check your internet connection e try again.
codes.SECURE_CONNECTION_FAILED: Secure connection failed. Check backend HTTPS certificate.
codes.CONFLICT: This update conflicts con newer saved clinical data
codes.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check highlighted fields e try again.
codes.SERVER_ERROR: Qualcosa è andato storto while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE: We could not connect a server right now. Please try again shortly.
codes.BACKEND_ENDPOINT_NOT_FOUND: Backend API endpoint was not found. domain is reachable, but API route is not deployed.
codes.RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND: requested record could not be found. Please aggiorna e try again.
codes.ADMISSION_NOT_FOUND: admission record could not be found. Please return a tracciamento e try again.
codes.BACKEND_METHOD_NOT_ALLOWED: Backend endpoint exists but does not accept this request.
codes.BACKEND_INVALID_RESPONSE: Backend returned an invalid sign-in response. It may be serving website instead of API.
codes.SESSION_STORAGE_FAILED: We could not salva your sign-in session. Please try again.
codes.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Wait a moment e try again.
codes.ROUTE_ERROR: An errore occurred while caricamento this page
codes.INVALID_CREDENTIALS: Invalid email o password. Please check your details e try again.
codes.MULTIPLE_TENANTS: Multiple tenants found. Please seleziona a tenant.
codes.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session expired. Accedi again a continua.
codes.USER_EXISTS: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.
codes.AI_UNAUTHORIZED: AI API key invalid o expired
codes.ADMISSION_SAVE_FAILED: Impossibile salvare admission record. Controlla la connessione e riprova
codes.ADMISSION_VALIDATION_FAILED: Some obbligatorio admission details are missing. Please rivedi highlighted fields.
codes.ADMISSION_RECOMMENDATION_FAILED: Unable a generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still rivedi e salva admission.
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_LOAD_FAILED: Impossibile caricare admission form. Controlla la connessione e riprova
codes.VENTILATION_SESSION_DRAFT_SAVE_FAILED: Impossibile salvare local admission draft. Please try again

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.prototypeFraming: This app is a prototype per reference e training. It is not intended per direct clinical use.
disclaimer.acknowledgeHint: Confirm that you have read e understood disclaimer

capture.title: Dataset capture
capture.governanceNotice: Captured candidates are submitted per reviewer approval only. Raw pasted notes are not stored in approved datasets o sent a external model services.
capture.roleBlocked: Dataset candidate capture requires an approved clinical write ruolo.
capture.offlineNotice: Offline submissions are in coda con structured fields only e sync when connectivity returns.
capture.notePlaceholder: Paste a de-identified bedside note, then rivedi structured fields before submitting.
capture.facilityMissing: Seleziona o sign in a one active struttura before submitting.
capture.noteRequired: Paste a note before creating a preview.
capture.identifierWarning: Identifier-like text was detected. It is not included in structured rivedi payload.
capture.trainingApprovalAvailable: Training approval controls remain in governed rivedi workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.localStorageDescription: Preferences e session data are stored only on this device. Nessunthing is sent a external servers.
privacy.optionalAI: If online AI features are enabled, those requests may be sent a configured services.

about.title: Informazioni
about.prototypeScope: This is a prototype per reference e training. Nessunt per clinical use.

safety.title: Clinical safety
safety.body: AI Vent provides documentation support e advisory safety prompts only. It does not replace clinical judgment, issue treatment orders, o determine ventilatore impostazioni.
safety.secondary: Confirm all decisions against paziente, your struttura workflow, e local clinical protocol.
safety.acknowledgeLabel: I understand this is advisory decision support only
safety.acknowledgeHint: Obbligatorio before continuing a clinical workflows
safety.syncDeferred: Safety acknowledgement is saved on this device e will be sincronizzato when backend authentication is available.

clinicalSafety.title: Use as advisory support
clinicalSafety.body: Rivedi safety note before using AI Vent. app can highlight missing data e uncertainty, but a qualified clinician remains responsible per paziente care decisions.

facilityWorkflow.title: Stay in struttura context
facilityWorkflow.body: Use active struttura e ruolo shown by your session. Keep records within correct struttura workflow e follow local escalation, rivedi, e approval procedures.

inputs.title: Inserisciing inputs
inputs.body: Use Ammetti a inserisci available clinical parameters (SpO2, PaO2, PaCO2, pH, respiratory rate, etc.). Opzionale ABG values improve confidence when available, but missing opzionale data should be reviewed as uncertainty rather than treated as a salva blocker.

recommendations.title: Interpreting recommendations
recommendations.body: Recommendations mostra advisory ventilatore setting references con a confidence tier. Match quality reflects how well dataset cases align con your inputs. Use matched cases as reference only e verify against clinical judgment.

monitoring.title: Monitoraggio e alerts
monitoring.body: After reviewing a raccomandazione, use Monitoraggio a log vitals e labs over time. Alerts highlight values outside set thresholds e should be assessed according a local protocol.

offline.title: Offline behavior
offline.body: Core workflow (Ammetti, advisory summaries, monitoraggio) works offline. Data is saved locally. Opzionale AI features require connectivity. When indietro online, continua as normale.

glossary.PEEP: Positive end-expiratory pressure (cmH₂O). Maintains lung volume e oxygenation.
glossary.FiO2: Fraction of inspired oxygen (0–1). Percentage of oxygen in inspired gas.
glossary.IERatio: I:E ratio. Inspiratory a expiratory time ratio (e.g. 1:2).
glossary.tidalVolume: Volume corrente (mL). Volume delivered per breath.
glossary.PaCO2: Partial pressure of arterial carbon dioxide (mmHg).
glossary.ABG: Arterial blood gas values such as PaO2, PaCO2, e pH, tied a a sample time.
glossary.referenceStatus: Governance e verification state per a reference range. Only active approved o verified ranges are eligible per active decision-support display.
glossary.datasetCapture: Candidate de-identified records that need rivedi before dataset o training use.
glossary.reviewQueue: A work queue per rivedi decisions, corrections, exclusions, e audit reasons.
glossary.syncState: Current offline, online, o syncing state. Clinical records may still need later sync.
glossary.shadowMode: Governed model evaluation mode where outputs remain hidden da normale clinical workflows.

missingABG.title: Missing ABG values
missingABG.body: Recommendations work without ABG; inserisci SpO₂ e altro vitals when available. per better matching, aggiungi PaO₂, PaCO₂, e pH when you have them.

offline.title: Using app offline
offline.body: Ammetti, advisory summaries, e monitoraggio work offline. Data is stored locally. Opzionale AI suggestions require internet. Sync is not obbligatorio per core workflow.

unverifiedReference.title: Reference range is not active
unverifiedReference.body: Draft, in sospeso, retired, rejected, e unverified ranges are not eligible per active decision-support display. Rivedi source, version, scope, e verification status.

roleRestrictedModelHelp.title: Model-readiness aiuto is restricted
roleRestrictedModelHelp.body: Predictive model readiness e shadow-mode details are visible only a approved governance roles. Nessunrmal clinical workflows do not expose model internals.

needsReview.title: Record needs rivedi
needsReview.body: Use rivedi queue a check submitted data, request correction, approva eligible records, o escludi records con an audit motivo.

guides.home: Rivedi struttura context, sync state, active admissions, red flags, e records needing rivedi before opening a paziente workflow.
guides.admit: Capture paziente pathway e available clinical values. Mark unavailable data clearly e rivedi backend-confirmed calculations after salva.
guides.tracking: Use tracciamento a scan recent ventilation status e rivedi needs. Read trend flags con source data e local protocol context.
guides.abgVentUpdate: Add new ABG results and ventilator settings as time-stamped records so earlier values remain available for review.
guides.datasetCapture: Use dataset capture per de-identified candidate records. Human rivedi is obbligatorio before approved training-data use.
guides.reviewQueue: Use rivedi queue a approva, request correction, o escludi records while preserving audit trail.
guides.dashboard: Use dashboards per aggregate quality, rivedi, reference, e governance status. Avoid paziente identifiers in governance summaries.
guides.settings: Use impostazioni per account, struttura, accessibility, privacy, sync, e reference visibility preferences where authorized.
guides.hypoxemia: Rivedi FiO₂ e PEEP; consider recruitment; check per shunt o V/Q mismatch.
guides.hypercapnia: Rivedi minute ventilation (rate × tidal volume); consider permissive hypercapnia per protocol.
guides.acidosis: Address ventilation e perfusion; correct underlying cause per protocol.
guides.general: Use recommendations as decision support only. Validate against local protocols e clinical judgment.

ai.label: Supporto decisionale IA
ai.enableHint: Use online AI per complex cases only; local recommendations always available
ai.providerHint: AI provider (e.g. OpenAI); API key is per provider

patientReason.description: Capture paziente pathway, Età, body metrics, e motivo per support.

oxygenAbgVentilator.description: Record current oxygen support, observation time, oxygenation, vital signs, available ABG values, e uncertain values. Ventilatore impostazioni are suggested on avanti step da dataset.
oxygenAbgVentilator.oxygenSupportHint: Choose support paziente is receiving when these values are measured.
oxygenAbgVentilator.timeHint: Use local date e time per observation.

saveReview.description: Rivedi e modifica dataset-suggested ventilatore impostazioni, backend readiness, clinician confirmation, override motivo when needed, rivedi status, e sync state.
saveReview.suggestedSettingsHint: Prefilled from the dataset using patient biodata and the current oxygen and ABG values. Edit only when the bedside decision differs.
saveReview.recommendationEmpty: Inserisci clinical values e tap Avanti a generate a dataset raccomandazione.
saveReview.recommendationError: Unable a generate clinical recommendations right now. You can still rivedi e salva admission.
saveReview.recommendationNeedsClinicalInputs: Raccomandazione needs clinical motivo, SpO2, respiratory rate, e heart rate.

observations.title: Additional observations
observations.description: Record any extra clinical data not covered above (e.g. labs, imaging, medications, comorbidity scores). Each observation is a single nome–value pair. Opzionale; you can skip this step.
observations.name: Nome

timeSeries.title: Time series (vital signs over time)
timeSeries.description: Track vital signs o altro metrics at multiple time points (e.g. SpO₂, RR, HR at 0h, 1h, 2h). Used per trend analysis e monitoraggio after you start session. Opzionale; you can aggiungi points later on monitoraggio screen.
